news.title: Atlanta police arrest 5 protesters during Peachtree Road Race
news.summary: A group of demonstrators protested on the Peachtree Road Race route Saturday morning, leading to multiple arrests by Atlanta police.

news.title: 2 metro Atlanta men charged with trafficking meth
news.summary: Instead of towing a vehicle, authorities say a tow truck driver carried a load of drugs.

news.title: Metro Atlanta driver ticketed for dangerous driving overturns vehicle less than an hour later
news.summary: A driver is fortunate to be alive after a serious crash in Chattahoochee Hills that happened less than an hour after being stopped and cited for dangerous driving, according to police.

news.title: Police investigate SW Atlanta shooting that left 2 men injured
news.summary: Two men were taken to a nearby hospital after being shot in the legs in southwest Atlanta early Saturday morning.

news.title: 2 women injured in Atlanta shooting on Piedmont Avenue
news.summary: Two women were hospitalized following a shooting in downtown Atlanta.

news.title: 1 dead, 1 injured in shooting after Gainesville concert
news.summary: A Friday night shooting after a downtown holiday concert in Gainesville left one man dead and another person hospitalized.

news.title: Metro Atlanta law enforcement agency mourns death of longtime lieutenant
news.summary: The Rockdale County Sheriff’s Office is mourning the death of one of its leaders after Lt. Darlene Duke, a supervisor in the agency’s Jail Operations Bureau. Officials have not released her cause of d
